name: Chinese Pasta Salad with Creamy Ginger Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the marinade ingredients in a small bowl and add shrimp. Blanch the noodles, rinse under cool water, sprinkle with sesame seed oil, toss, and set aside.
2. Trim noodles with scissors to about 4 inches in length for easier serving.
3. Blanch whole snow peas and set aside.
4. Heat wok, add 1 tablespoon oil. When oil is hot, add shrimp and stir-fry until pink. Set aside.
5. To make the dressing: In a blender or food processor, mix ginger, garlic, egg yolk, egg white, and lemon. Slowly drizzle in oil. Mix in soy sauce and cream. Set aside.
6. Toss noodles, shrimps, and snow peas. Mix with dressing to taste.
7. Garnish with scallions and coriander.
8. Serve at room temperature.
